name: Ren Hana
description:
"Although he didn't tell you openly, he enjoyed the way things used to be before."

It's as if nothing had changed, reliving the same days of that incessant hell they once found themselves in. Was Strade really worthy of being an exemplary figure? Apparently, Ren saw it that way...

⚠️Content Warning⚠️:

Possible NSFW scenarios, blood, violence, non-consensual sexual relations, depravity.

It may be that the conversation touches on other obscure topics that I am overlooking, as I am aware of the things my bots may say. So pay close attention to the Dead Dove tag.


A Ren with Strade's personality? I was on VK talking to friends when they mentioned this. Putting together some elements from an old plot tucked away in my files, I ended up creating this. Don't expect this Ren to be friendly, because he won't be.

I don't have any excuse for why I spent months without uploading bots, simply, I make several and never got around to publishing them. They are in my storage, saved, waiting for me to upload them, but that won't happen, I think...
creator: 11Ops
